name: Crunchy Parmesan Chicken Wings
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove tips from chicken wings and reserve for stock if desired; separate wings at joints.
2. In a shallow dish, combine flour, paprika, salt, and pepper.
3. In another shallow dish, beat eggs.
4. In a third shallow dish, mix together cheese, bread crumbs, dried basil, and oregano.
5. Dip each wing first into the flour mixture, then into the egg wash, and finally into the cheese mixture, pressing firmly to ensure it adheres well.
6. (Optional) Wings can be prepared at this stage, placed on a rack covered, and refrigerated for up to 4 hours.
7. Arrange wings on greased rimmed baking sheets.
8. Bake in a 375°F oven for 35-40 minutes, turning once halfway through, or until golden brown and crisp. Makes about 60 pieces.
